title: More Nonsense Limerick 34
content:
There was an old person of Putney,
    Whose food was roast spiders and chutney,
    Which he took with his tea, 
    Within sight of the sea,
    That romantic old person of Putney.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 34"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
